name: Delicious Chicken with Guajillo Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the chiles, onions, and garlic. Remove the seeds from the chiles and soak them in water for 20 minutes.
2. Blend the roasted onions, garlic, a bit of water, and soaked chiles together until smooth. Set aside.
3. Heat oil in a pan and lightly fry the chicken until golden brown.
4. Add the sauce mixture (including salt) to the pan and cook for 15 minutes at high heat.
5. Pour in half a liter of water, chicken broth, and cover the pot. Simmer until the chicken is tender.
6. In a separate pan, fry the mini onions in butter until crispy. Cut small balls from the avocados and set aside.
7. Place the cooked chicken on a serving platter. Drizzle with the sauce and garnish with the fried onions and avocado balls.
8. Serve promptly.
